Title: Save for Later - Move Item
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Product in cart, user logged in on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Save for Later' on a line item
[WAIT] wait for item to move to saved-for-later section
[ASSERT] verify item appears in saved list
[ASSERT] verify item removed from active cart section
Assertions:
[DOM] item visible in saved-for-later section
[DOM] item no longer in active cart line items
[MATH] cart subtotal excludes saved item
[STATE] cart badge decremented
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] moveItemToSaved or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: item stays in cart instead of moving; saved-for-later section not shown; subtotal not updated
Cleanup: Move item back to cart or remove
References: tests/VCST-3928-save4later-delay-fix; Synced: VCST-4205 (2026-05-19) — VALID for non-configurable products; VCST-4205 anomalies (A1/A2/A3/A4) affect configurable SFL flows only

Title: Save for Later - Move Back
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Item in saved-for-later list, user on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Move to Cart' on an item in the saved-for-later section
[WAIT] wait for item to appear in active cart
[ASSERT] verify item in active cart
[ASSERT] verify item removed from saved list
Assertions:
[DOM] item listed in active cart line items
[DOM] item no longer in saved-for-later section
[MATH] cart subtotal includes moved item
[STATE] cart badge incremented
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] moveItemToCart or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: item stays in saved list; active cart not updated; subtotal unchanged; badge not incremented
Cleanup: Remove item from cart
References: tests/VCST-3928-save4later-delay-fix; Synced: VCST-4205 (2026-05-19) — VALID for non-configurable products; configurable SFL round-trip coverage in CRL-GQL-100/101 (050b3) and CFG-E2E-058..066 (072b)

Title: Apply Coupon - Valid Code
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in. Cart has at least 1 eligible item. Coupon @td(COUPON_FIXED5.code) (fixed $5 off, no min-subtotal threshold) is active in the env.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] locate coupon/promo code input field (Coupons sidebar — 'Enter custom code' input)
[ACT] type @td(COUPON_FIXED5.code)
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] wait for discount to be applied
[ASSERT] verify discount line appears in order summary
Assertions:
[DOM] coupon accepted confirmation or discount line visible
[MATH] cart total = subtotal - discount amount (2 decimal places)
[DOM] discount amount shown in order summary
[STATE] coupon code displayed in cart summary
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] applyCoupon or addOrUpdateCoupon mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: apply button spins indefinitely; no discount shown; error message for valid code; total not reduced
Cleanup: Remove coupon and items from cart

Title: Apply Coupon - Invalid Code
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in, items in cart
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] locate coupon input field
[ACT] type 'FAKECODE'
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] wait for error response
[ASSERT] verify error message displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] error message visible (e.g. 'Invalid coupon code' or similar)
[STATE] no discount applied to cart
[MATH] cart total unchanged after invalid coupon attempt
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] applyCoupon mutation returns error message in response (not in errors[])
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx (API-level error is expected, not HTTP 4xx)
Failure_Signals: no error shown for fake code; discount incorrectly applied; cart total changes
Cleanup: none (no state change)

Title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign In
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User has an account, at least one product available, note: search index may lag 30-60s after any price/stock changes
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and log in
[ACT] add two or more products to the cart
[ASSERT] note cart contents: product names, quantities, line totals
[ACT] click user name in top header → click Logout in popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
[WAIT] wait for signed-out state confirmed
[ACT] sign back in with same credentials
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] compare cart contents to noted items
Assertions:
[STATE] cart contains same items after sign out/in cycle
[DOM] quantities match pre-sign-out values
[MATH] cart subtotal matches pre-sign-out subtotal
[STATE] no duplicate or missing items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart restore
Failure_Signals: cart empty after re-login; items duplicated after merge; quantities wrong; subtotal mismatch
Cleanup: Remove added items from cart

Title: Cart Persistence - Price Updates While Signed Out
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Mutates product price on shared AGENT-TEST fixture. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Restore price in Cleanup. Allow 30-60s search index lag after price change. User has account, admin access available.
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] add product to cart
[ASSERT] note current displayed price
[ACT] click user name in top header → click Logout in popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] navigate to Catalog > Products, find product, update price, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} with user account
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify price reflects admin update
Assertions:
[STATE] cart contains product after re-login
[DOM] unit price shows updated price (not stale cached value)
[MATH] line total and subtotal reflect new price
[FORMAT] price formatted to 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify price change saved in admin
[API] getCart query returns updated price
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: cart shows old stale price after re-login; price update not reflected even after wait; subtotal mismatch
Cleanup: Restore product price in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Persistence - Cross-Device (Cross-Session)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
TOOL-LIMITATION: Concurrent dual-context cross-session test cannot be executed by a single MCP agent (requires two simultaneous isolated browser contexts). Use API-layer verification instead: add items via storefront, verify via getCart GraphQL query using same user credentials from a second API call. Do not attempt dual-browser simulation via single agent.
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} in playwright-chrome browser context
[ACT] add two or more products to cart
[WAIT] wait 3s for cart to sync server-side
[API] call getCart GraphQL query with {{USER_EMAIL}} credentials via Postman/curl (second 'session')
[ASSERT] verify getCart response contains same items added in browser
Assertions:
[STATE] getCart API response contains items added in browser session (proves server-side persistence)
[DOM] cart badge and page state consistent with server-side data
[STATE] cart synchronized via server-side account, not just localStorage
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query response errors[] is empty; lineItems count matches browser cart
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: getCart API returns empty lineItems when browser shows items; qty mismatch between browser and API response
Cleanup: Remove items from cart

Title: Cart Persistence - Guest Cart Merge on Sign In
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Store allows guest shopping; user has registered account with existing cart items; user currently signed out
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} without signing in (guest session)
[ACT] add one or more products to cart as guest
[ASSERT] verify guest cart shows added items
[ACT] navigate to sign in and log in with registered account
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify guest items merged with account cart
[ASSERT] verify no items dropped from either source
Assertions:
[STATE] all guest cart items present in merged cart
[STATE] pre-existing account cart items retained
[DOM] no duplicate line items for same SKU
[MATH] cart subtotal reflects all merged items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sign-in and cart page
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: guest items silently dropped on login; account items overwritten by guest cart; duplicate line items created; subtotal wrong
Cleanup: Remove all items from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Out of Stock After Add
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Sets product inventory to 0 on shared fixture. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Restore inventory in Cleanup. Allow 30-60s search index lag after inventory change.
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart and verify it shows as in-stock
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] navigate to product inventory settings, set inventory to 0, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh page
[ASSERT] verify out-of-stock item flagged in cart
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout is blocked
Assertions:
[DOM] out-of-stock item visually flagged (e.g., 'Out of Stock' badge or warning)
[STATE] 'Proceed to Checkout' button disabled or shows blocking error
[DOM] option to remove unavailable item present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify inventory set to 0 in admin
[API] getCart query reflects out-of-stock status
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no indication of out-of-stock on cart page; checkout allowed with out-of-stock item; no option to remove
Cleanup: Restore inventory in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Product Unpublished After Add
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Unpublishes a product on shared fixture, removing it from catalog. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Republish in Cleanup. Allow 30-60s search index lag.
Steps:
[ACT] add product to cart
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] find product in catalog, unpublish/deactivate it, save
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh page
[ASSERT] verify product shown as unavailable
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked
Assertions:
[DOM] unavailable item shows 'This item is no longer available' or similar message
[STATE] checkout blocked until unavailable item removed
[DOM] option to remove unavailable item visible
[STATE] removing item unblocks checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify product set to unpublished/inactive in admin
[API] getCart query reflects unavailable status
[CONSOLE] no JS errors

Title: Cart Validation - Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Product in cart with qty=1; product has limited stock (e.g., 5 units); inventory tracking enabled
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click '+' (Increase quantity) or use direct input to set qty exceeding stock (e.g., type 10 when max 5)
[WAIT] wait for validation response
[ASSERT] verify validation error or auto-cap applied
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked if qty still exceeds stock
Assertions:
[DOM] warning message displayed indicating qty exceeds available stock
[STATE] quantity auto-corrected to max available OR checkout blocked with error
[DOM] max available quantity stated in error message
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns stock validation error or errors[] reflects constraint
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no validation shown for over-stock qty; checkout proceeds with qty > stock; no indication of stock limit
Cleanup: Restore item quantity to valid amount

Title: Cart Validation - Mixed Valid and Invalid Items
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Sets one product to inventory=0 and unpublishes a second product on shared fixtures. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Restore both in Cleanup. Allow 30-60s search index lag.
Steps:
[ACT] add three or more products to cart
[NAV] log in to {{ADMIN_URL}}
[ACT] set one product inventory to 0 (out of stock)
[ACT] unpublish a second product
[WAIT] wait 30-60s for search index to update
[NAV] return to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart and refresh
[ASSERT] verify valid items unaffected, invalid items flagged
[ACT] remove all invalid items
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout proceeds
Assertions:
[DOM] valid items displayed with correct prices and quantities
[DOM] out-of-stock item individually flagged
[DOM] unpublished item individually flagged with separate message
[STATE] checkout blocked while invalid items present
[STATE] checkout proceeds after all invalid items removed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] verify both admin changes saved
[API] getCart query returns per-item status flags
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: valid items affected by invalid item flags; all items show same error; checkout proceeds with invalid items; individual item messages missing
Cleanup: Restore inventory and republish products in admin; remove items from cart

Title: Price Increase During Session

[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

Title: Discount Removal During Session

[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Deactivates an active promotion on shared fixture. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Re-activate promotion in Cleanup. Allow 30-60s search index lag. SEED REQUIRED: Product with active promotion in cart ({{VALID_COUPON_CODE}} or auto-promo).

[ADMIN] verify inventory set to 0 in admin
[API] getCart query reflects out-of-stock status
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no out-of-stock indicator on cart; checkout allowed with out-of-stock item; no removal prompt; other items affected
Cleanup: Restore inventory in admin; remove item from cart

Title: Checkout Blocked by Out-of-Stock Item
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: A dedicated AGENT-TEST out-of-stock product (@td(PROD_OOS.sku)) must be maintained in QA catalog with inventory permanently set to 0. This product serves as a stable OOS fixture — do not restore its inventory. Also requires one standard in-stock product in cart. Run /qa-seed-data to provision OOS fixture.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with mixed availability items
[ASSERT] verify out-of-stock item shows unavailable status
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout' button
[WAIT] wait for validation response
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked with clear error message
[ACT] remove the out-of-stock item from cart
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout' again
[ASSERT] verify checkout proceeds
Assertions:
[STATE] checkout blocked when cart contains out-of-stock items
[DOM] clear error message identifies which item(s) are unavailable
[STATE] after removing unavailable item, checkout proceeds normally
[STATE] in-stock items not affected by validation block
[DOM] error message is user-friendly and actionable
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity or checkout mutation returns blocking error for out-of-stock
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: checkout proceeds with out-of-stock item; error message vague or missing; in-stock items blocked unnecessarily; error not cleared after removal
Cleanup: Remove all test items from cart

Title: Cart Item Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in; product in cart; product has limited stock (e.g., 3 units available)
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] attempt to increase item quantity beyond available stock (e.g., set to 10 when only 3 available via '+' or direct input)
[WAIT] wait for validation response
[ASSERT] verify validation error or qty cap applied
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout' with over-stock quantity (if still set)
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked or qty corrected
Assertions:
[DOM] validation error displayed indicating qty exceeds available stock
[STATE] qty either auto-capped at maximum available (3) or checkout blocked with error
[DOM] error message clearly states available stock limit
[STATE] cannot proceed to checkout with qty exceeding stock
[MATH] cart subtotal reflects valid (capped) quantity
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns stock constraint error or errors[]
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: no validation for over-stock qty; checkout proceeds with qty > stock; no stock limit communicated; subtotal shows over-stock amount
Cleanup: Restore item quantity to valid amount or remove item

Title: Cart With Zero-Quantity Item Cannot Proceed to Checkout
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in; product in cart
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] manually set item quantity to 0 via direct input in spinbutton
[KEY] press Tab to commit
[WAIT] wait for cart behavior (auto-remove or validation error)
[ASSERT] verify cart handles zero-qty: auto-removed or error shown
[ACT] if item remains, click 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] verify checkout blocked if zero-qty item persists
Assertions:
[STATE] zero-qty item auto-removed from cart OR clear validation error shown (quantity must be at least 1)
[STATE] if auto-removed: cart count decremented, subtotal recalculated, empty state if last item
[STATE] cannot proceed to checkout with zero-quantity items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] removeCartItem or changeCartItemQuantity mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors after zero-qty input
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: zero-qty item remains without error; checkout proceeds with qty=0; API accepts qty=0; page crashes on zero input
Cleanup: Remove all test items from cart

Title: Cart Transfer - Guest Cart to New Account With Empty Cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
A registered user account exists with empty cart; user is currently signed out
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add 2 products to guest cart with different quantities
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify 2 items in guest cart with correct quantities
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (account has empty cart)
[WAIT] wait for cart transfer
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify same 2 products transferred with original quantities
[ASSERT] verify cart subtotal is correct
Assertions:
[STATE] guest cart fully transferred to authenticated user cart
[DOM] 2 line items present with correct quantities
[MATH] subtotal matches pre-sign-in guest cart total
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns transferred guest items
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during transfer
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart operations
Failure_Signals: guest cart items lost; quantities reset; empty cart shown after sign-in
Cleanup: Remove items from cart

Title: Cart Persistence - Empty Cart Stays Empty After Sign-Out/Sign-In
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in; cart is empty (guaranteed by [PRE:RESET_CART] above — test is independent of execution order).
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and log in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify cart is empty (0 items or empty state message)
[ACT] click user name in top header → click Logout in popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
[WAIT] wait for sign-out to complete
[ACT] sign in again as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify cart is still empty - no phantom items appeared
[ASSERT] verify cart badge shows 0 or is hidden
Assertions:
[STATE] cart remains empty after sign-out/sign-in cycle
[DOM] empty cart state displayed; no unexpected line items
[DOM] cart badge count = 0 or badge hidden
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns empty lineItems array
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: phantom items appear in cart after sign-in; cart count badge shows nonzero value; error message instead of empty state
Cleanup: None

Title: Stale Cart Price Warning - Admin Price Change During Session
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Mutates product price list on shared AGENT-TEST fixture. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Revert price in Cleanup.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and log in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] add a product to cart and note the unit price shown
[NAV] navigate to {{BACK_URL}} admin panel
[ACT] change the price of the same product in the price list
[NAV] navigate back to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh the cart page
[WAIT] wait for cart to reload with updated prices
[ASSERT] verify cart shows updated price or a price-changed notification
[ASSERT] verify line total recalculated based on new price
Assertions:
[STATE] cart price updated to reflect admin price change
[DOM] price warning or updated price visible on cart page
[MATH] line total = new unit price x quantity
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns updated unitPrice from current price list
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on price refresh
[NETWORK] cart API call returns fresh price data
Failure_Signals: stale/cached price shown after admin change; no warning displayed; line total uses old price; checkout proceeds with wrong price
Cleanup: Revert price in admin; remove cart items

Title: Checkout Recalculates Totals to Reflect Current Prices
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User logged in with item in cart; prices are current
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with items
[ASSERT] note the current cart subtotal
[ACT] proceed to checkout (select delivery and shipping)
[WAIT] wait for checkout page to load order summary
[ASSERT] verify checkout order summary subtotal uses current prices (not cached)
[ASSERT] verify line item prices on checkout match cart page prices
[ASSERT] verify total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts
Assertions:
[MATH] checkout subtotal = sum of (current unit price x quantity) for all items
[STATE] no price discrepancy between cart and checkout
[DOM] order summary displays correct line prices
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] checkout API returns recalculated totals
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during checkout transition
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: checkout shows different total than cart; cached prices used at checkout; price mismatch between cart and order summary
Cleanup: click 'Clear cart' button → click 'Yes' in the confirmation dialog

Title: Tier Price Update When Quantity Drops Below Threshold
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: Product with tier pricing configured must exist in QA catalog and B2B virtual catalog. Set @td(PROD_TIER_PRICED.sku) env var. Admin step: configure price list with tier rule: qty >= 10 = reduced price per unit; qty < 10 = standard price. User logged in.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/@td(PROD_TIER_PRICED.sku)
[ACT] set quantity to tier threshold (e.g., 10) and add to cart
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify tier price is applied (e.g., $8/unit)
[ASSERT] verify line total = tier price x quantity
[ACT] reduce quantity below tier threshold (e.g., change to 5)
[WAIT] wait for cart to recalculate
[ASSERT] verify unit price reverts to standard price (e.g., $10/unit)
[ASSERT] verify line total recalculated with standard price
Assertions:
[MATH] tier price applied when qty >= threshold; standard price when qty < threshold
[STATE] price updates dynamically on quantity change
[DOM] unit price display changes when quantity crosses tier boundary
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] changeCartItemQuantity mutation returns updated unitPrice
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on quantity change
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on price recalculation
Failure_Signals: price stays at tier rate after reducing below threshold; line total not recalculated; unit price display stale
Cleanup: Reset cart item quantity or remove

Title: Cart Validation - Removed/Unavailable Product in Cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE: Deactivates/unpublishes a product on shared fixture. Run in isolated environment only; do not run during parallel regression. Reactivate in Cleanup.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} and add a product to cart
[NAV] navigate to {{BACK_URL}} admin and deactivate/unpublish the product
[NAV] navigate back to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] refresh cart page
[ASSERT] verify unavailable product shows error indicator or is flagged
[ASSERT] verify checkout is blocked with clear message about unavailable product
[ACT] remove the unavailable item from cart
[ASSERT] verify cart updates and checkout becomes available (if other valid items exist)
Assertions:
[DOM] unavailable product marked with error/warning state
[DOM] checkout blocked until unavailable item removed
[STATE] removing unavailable item unblocks checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns validation errors for unavailable product
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx
Failure_Signals: unavailable product shown as normal; checkout proceeds; no error message; cart crashes on load
Cleanup: Reactivate product in admin; remove from cart

Title: Cart Validation - Multiple Simultaneous Errors Displayed
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
SEED REQUIRED: Requires two validation states simultaneously: (1) @td(PROD_OOS.sku) (permanent OOS fixture, inventory=0) added to cart, and (2) a second product with low stock ({{LOW_STOCK_SKU}}, stock ≤ 5) with qty set above available stock. Both seeds must exist. Run /qa-seed-data first.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart containing: 1 out-of-stock item + 1 over-max-quantity item
[ASSERT] verify BOTH validation errors are shown simultaneously (not just the first)
[ASSERT] verify each error message is associated with the correct line item
[ASSERT] verify checkout is blocked
[ACT] resolve one error (remove out-of-stock item)
[ASSERT] verify first error cleared but second error still shown
[ACT] resolve second error (adjust quantity)
[ASSERT] verify all errors cleared and checkout unblocked
Assertions:
[DOM] multiple error messages displayed simultaneously on different line items
[DOM] each error is item-specific not a single generic message
[STATE] checkout unblocks only after ALL validation errors resolved
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns multiple validation errors
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx
Failure_Signals: only one error shown at a time; generic error replaces item-specific errors; fixing one error hides the other; checkout unblocks with remaining errors
Cleanup: Remove test items from cart
